personal.preferred_title: Senior Data Engineer | Capacity Planning & AI-Driven Infrastructure Optimization
personal.address: Murphy, TX (Plano area) / 424 Oriole Dr., Murphy, TX 75094

summary: Senior Capacity and Data Engineer with 20+ years of enterprise experience driving bottleneck reduction, throughput optimization, and forecasting-led planning decisions. Built automated analytics pipelines for 6,000+ endpoints, developed predictive models (Prophet/scikit-learn), and delivered executive risk dashboards for proactive resource allocation. Strong in Python, SQL, PySpark, and cross-functional execution between engineering and operations teams.

experience.title: Senior Capacity & Data Engineer
bullets: Performed enterprise capacity analysis and forecasting across constrained infrastructure domains, improving prioritization and delivery outcomes.
Built predictive models using Prophet and scikit-learn to identify bottlenecks 3-6 months ahead and guide proactive remediation.
Executed line and utilization analysis across telemetry from 6,000+ endpoints; identified capacity gaps and drove action plans to completion.
Integrated tool performance data from TrueSight, AppDynamics, and CA APM into leadership-facing risk summaries and KPI dashboards.
Drove resource right-sizing and efficiency improvements through data-driven throughput and constraint analysis.

experience.title: Performance Engineer
bullets: Led performance investigations to identify operational bottlenecks and recommend throughput improvements.
Built before/after performance reporting and impact analysis for leadership decision-making.
Partnered across engineering teams to improve production stability and efficiency.

experience.title: Senior Consultant (CA APM SME)
bullets: Managed large-scale monitoring and performance environments and delivered capacity insights for operational planning.
Built dashboards/alerts/extraction scripts to support trend analysis and risk visibility.
Coordinated with technical teams to execute performance improvement initiatives.

education.degree: High Diploma / Post-Graduate Diploma in Computer Engineering Technology / Computer Science
Bachelor of Science in Civil Engineering

projects.name: HorizonScale - AI Capacity Forecasting Engine
projects.description: Replaced manual forecasting with AI-driven modeling and dashboards; reduced forecasting cycles by 90% and improved planning lead time.
